products.title: Everyday Tee — Ecru
products.raw_description: Our signature everyday tee, cut from a breathable 180gsm single jersey. 100% GOTS-certified organic cotton grown without synthetic pesticides. Garment-dyed with low-impact fibre-reactive dyes. Pre-shrunk, side-seamed. Machine wash cold, line dry. Woven, cut and sewn in a Fair Wear audited unit.

products.title: Everyday Tee — Moss
products.raw_description: The Everyday Tee in a deep moss, dyed with natural plant extracts. Fabric: 100% organic cotton (GOTS), 180gsm. Slight colour variation between batches is part of the charm of natural dyeing. Wash cold with like colours.

products.title: Boxy Crop Tee
products.raw_description: Boxy, cropped, effortless. Mid-weight 200gsm organic cotton jersey — 95% GOTS organic cotton with 5% elastane for a touch of recovery. OEKO-TEX Standard 100 certified fabric. Drop shoulders, raw-look hem.

products.title: Hand Block-Print Shirt
products.raw_description: Hand block-printed in Jaipur using natural indigo. Lightweight 130gsm cambric, 100% GOTS certified organic cotton. Corozo nut buttons (no plastic). Each shirt is slightly unique due to hand printing. Gentle machine wash.

products.title: Heavy Canvas Tote
products.raw_description: Carries everything. 340gsm heavy canvas woven from 100% organic cotton, undyed and unbleached. Reinforced handles rated to 20kg. Replaces a lifetime of plastic bags.

products.title: Mud-Dye Midi Dress
products.raw_description: A-line midi in traditional mud-resist dyed fabric. 100% organic cotton poplin, GOTS certified, 140gsm. Pockets, obviously. Dyed with iron-rich river mud and natural alum mordant — zero synthetic dye chemistry.

products.title: Merino Crew Sweater
products.raw_description: Featherweight warmth. Knitted from 100% extra-fine merino wool, certified to the Responsible Wool Standard — mulesing-free and traceable to farm lots in Tasmania. 12-gauge knit, fully fashioned to eliminate cutting waste. Hand wash or wool cycle.

products.title: Fisherman Rib Jumper
products.raw_description: Chunky fisherman rib in a blend built to last decades: 80% RWS merino wool / 20% recycled wool reclaimed from post-consumer garments. OEKO-TEX certified yarns. Comes with free lifetime repair — send it back, we fix it.

products.title: Ribbed Wool Beanie
products.raw_description: Classic ribbed beanie. 100% mulesing-free merino (RWS certified), naturally odour-resistant and warm even when damp. Undyed charcoal fleece — the colour is the sheep's own.

products.title: Everyday Cardigan
products.raw_description: Soft everyday layer. 70% merino wool (RWS), 30% TENCEL lyocell for drape and a cool touch. Corozo buttons. Knitted in a wind-powered mill in Denmark. Wool cycle, dry flat.

products.title: Lambswool Scarf
products.raw_description: Woven, not knitted, for a crisp drape. 100% lambswool from RWS-certified flocks, spun and woven in a solar-powered mill. OEKO-TEX Standard 100. 30 x 180 cm.

products.title: Breezy Linen Shirt — White
products.raw_description: The only shirt you need above 30°C. 100% European Flax certified linen, 185gsm, stonewashed for softness from day one. Linen uses a fraction of the water cotton needs and the whole flax plant is used. Mother-of-pearl buttons. Gets better with every wash.

products.title: Breezy Linen Shirt — Sky
products.raw_description: Breezy Linen Shirt in washed sky blue. 100% linen (European Flax), dyed with GOTS-approved low-impact dyes in a closed-loop water treatment facility. Relaxed fit, cut for airflow.

products.title: Drawstring Linen Trousers
products.raw_description: Holiday-at-home trousers. 55% European flax linen / 45% organic cotton for structure with softness. 210gsm. Elasticated drawstring waist, deep pockets. OEKO-TEX certified. Machine wash cool.

products.title: Hemp Overshirt
products.raw_description: A rugged overshirt in 60% hemp / 40% organic cotton twill, 280gsm. Hemp grows rain-fed with no pesticides and improves soil health. Corozo buttons, chest pockets. Wears in like denim, softens like linen.

products.title: Sundown Linen Dress
products.raw_description: Square-neck midi with side slits. 100% European Flax linen, garment-washed, 165gsm. Terracotta shade from low-impact dyes, OEKO-TEX certified fabric. Pockets. Line dry and embrace the crinkle.

products.title: Striped Linen Top
products.raw_description: Breton stripes, coastal linen. 100% European Flax certified linen in yarn-dyed navy stripe. 160gsm, boxy fit, drop shoulder. Plastic-free packaging, shipped carbon-neutral.

products.title: Re:Denim Trucker Jacket
products.raw_description: Classic trucker silhouette, circular construction. Denim woven from 70% post-consumer recycled cotton (GRS certified) and 30% organic cotton for fibre strength. Laser-finished instead of stone washing — saves ~35L of water per jacket. Send it back when worn out; we recycle it into the next run.

products.title: Re:Tee
products.raw_description: A tee made from tees. 60% GRS-certified recycled cotton (from textile offcuts) blended with 40% organic cotton. Because recycled cotton fibres are shorter, the blend keeps it durable. Undyed — the faded black comes entirely from the recycled feedstock. 170gsm.

products.title: Re:Loft Puffer Vest
products.raw_description: City-ready warmth with a clear conscience. Shell and lining: 100% recycled polyester (GRS) from post-consumer bottles. Fill: 100% recycled PET wadding, 120gsm loft. PFC-free water repellent finish. Packs into its own pocket.

products.title: Re:Denim Straight Jeans
products.raw_description: Straight-leg everyday jeans. 65% recycled cotton (GRS) / 33% organic cotton / 2% elastane for comfort stretch. Ozone-washed finish cuts water use by 60% vs conventional denim washing. Button fly, recycled-brass hardware.

products.title: Re:Fleece Sweatshirt
products.raw_description: Brushed-back fleece crew. 50% recycled cotton / 50% recycled polyester, both GRS certified, 320gsm. Made in a factory running 80% on rooftop solar. Take-back program: old Re:Fleece pieces become new ones.

products.title: Willow Wrap Dress
products.raw_description: Fluid, flattering, forest-green. 100% TENCEL™ Lyocell — wood pulp from FSC-certified eucalyptus, spun in a closed-loop process that recovers 99% of solvents. Butter-soft drape, naturally breathable and gentle on skin. B Corp certified maker.

products.title: Cloud Modal Tee
products.raw_description: The softest tee we make. 92% TENCEL™ Modal from beechwood, 8% elastane. Silky hand-feel, resists pilling, stays true after washing. Water-based prints only. 160gsm.

products.title: Slate Lyocell Shirt
products.raw_description: A dress shirt that breathes. 100% TENCEL Lyocell twill, 145gsm — cooler than cotton, softer than silk, made from FSC-certified wood in a closed-loop mill. Wrinkle-resistant enough to skip the iron most days.

products.title: Haven Lounge Pants
products.raw_description: Weekend-grade comfort. 70% TENCEL Modal / 30% organic cotton french terry, 250gsm. Elastic waist with internal drawcord. Dyed with certified low-impact dyes in a B Corp facility.

products.title: Ripple Slip Skirt
products.raw_description: Bias-cut slip skirt with liquid drape. 100% cupro — a regenerated fibre made from cotton linter waste that would otherwise be discarded, processed in a closed loop in Japan. Feels like silk, machine washable, vegan.

products.title: Field Chore Coat
products.raw_description: Built for decades, guaranteed for life. 100% organic cotton canvas (OCS certified), 380gsm duck weave. Triple-stitched seams, corozo buttons, four roomy pockets. If it rips, we repair it free — forever. SA8000-audited factory.

products.title: Carpenter Pants
products.raw_description: Workwear that works. 98% organic cotton canvas / 2% elastane, 340gsm. Hammer loop, ruler pocket, gusseted crotch. Reinforced knees double the garment's life. OCS certified fabric, lifetime repair guarantee.

products.title: Heavyweight Pocket Tee
products.raw_description: A tee with the density of armour. 240gsm heavyweight jersey, 100% organic cotton (OCS). Tubular knit — no side seams to twist. Chest pocket. Pre-washed so it fits the same at year five as day one.

products.title: Waxed Work Apron
products.raw_description: For makers. 100% organic cotton canvas with a natural beeswax coating (no PFAS, no plastic films). Cross-back straps distribute weight. Re-wax kit included — the finish is renewable, not disposable.

products.title: Timber Flannel Shirt
products.raw_description: Brushed both sides for warmth. 100% organic cotton flannel, 200gsm, yarn-dyed check so the pattern never fades. OCS certified, SA8000-audited stitching unit. Cut roomy for layering.

products.title: Deadstock Wool Blazer
products.raw_description: One of 40, ever. Cut from rescued deadstock suiting — 85% virgin wool / 15% polyamide — sourced from an Italian mill's unsold rolls. Using existing fabric means zero new fibre production for this piece. Half-canvas construction, made to order in 14 days.

products.title: Air Blouse
products.raw_description: Feather-light and fluid. 100% TENCEL Lyocell satin, 120gsm. Made to order — we cut only what's sold, so nothing ends up landfilled. Shell buttons. Cool iron if needed.

products.title: Eaux Slip Dress
products.raw_description: Evening ease. Deadstock viscose satin (rescued from a closed fashion house) — 100% viscose. Bias cut, adjustable straps. Each colourway limited to the fabric we could rescue; when it's gone, it's gone.

products.title: Sculpt Knit Tank
products.raw_description: Second-skin ribbed tank. 77% TENCEL Modal / 18% recycled polyamide / 5% elastane. Seamless knit construction produces near-zero cutting waste. Made to order.

products.title: Palazzo Trousers
products.raw_description: High-rise, wide-leg, floor-sweeping. 65% TENCEL Lyocell / 35% deadstock viscose blend twill. Made to order in our Lisbon atelier; full cost breakdown published on the product page.

products.title: Circuit Run Tee
products.raw_description: Race-day light at 110gsm. 100% recycled polyester (GRS certified) from post-consumer bottles — 6 bottles per tee. Wicks fast, dries faster. Ships with a Guppyfriend washing bag to catch microfibres. OEKO-TEX certified.

products.title: Flow Leggings
products.raw_description: Squat-proof, planet-kinder. 78% ECONYL® regenerated nylon (from recovered fishing nets and carpet waste) / 22% elastane. Four-way stretch, high compression, hidden waistband pocket. We publish our microfibre shedding test results — these shed 40% less than virgin nylon equivalents.

products.title: Reef Swim Shorts
products.raw_description: Beach-to-bar shorts. Shell: 100% recycled polyester (GRS) from ocean-bound plastic collected in coastal Kerala. Quick-dry, chlorine-resistant, PFC-free water repellent. Mesh-free lining in soft recycled jersey.

products.title: Studio Sports Bra
products.raw_description: Medium support, maximum recycled. 82% recycled polyester (GRS) / 18% elastane with a brushed matte finish. Removable pads in recycled foam. Bonded seams — fewer stitch lines, less irritation.

products.title: Ridgeline Trail Jacket
products.raw_description: Wind-shedding trail shell. 100% ECONYL regenerated nylon ripstop with PFC-free DWR. Packs to fist-size. Every zip, cord and toggle is recycled or recyclable — designed for single-material recycling at end of life.

products.title: Crew Tee 3-Pack
products.raw_description: Three everyday crew necks at an honest price. Soft-touch eco-friendly fabric: 60% cotton (Better Cotton Initiative) / 40% polyester. 160gsm. Tagless neck, ribbed collar. Machine wash warm.

products.title: Comfy Jogger
products.raw_description: Your new default trousers. Cosy brushed fleece — 65% BCI cotton / 35% polyester, 280gsm. Elastic cuffs, drawstring waist, phone pocket. Sustainably minded and budget friendly.

products.title: Easy Oxford Shirt
products.raw_description: A wardrobe staple, responsibly priced. 100% cotton oxford weave sourced through the Better Cotton Initiative. 140gsm, button-down collar, chest pocket. Easy-iron finish.

products.title: Everyday Hoodie
products.raw_description: Green in colour, greener in spirit. Eco-blend fleece: 55% BCI cotton / 45% polyester, 300gsm. Double-lined hood, kangaroo pocket. Planet-conscious comfort for less.

products.title: Breezy Summer Dress
products.raw_description: Sunshine-ready smock dress in a cheerful floral. Lightweight woven fabric: 100% viscose. Tiered skirt, elasticated cuffs. Hand wash recommended. Feel-good fashion at a feel-good price.

products.title: Classic Pique Polo
products.raw_description: Smart-casual sorted. Pique knit — 70% BCI cotton / 30% polyester, 220gsm. Two-button placket, ribbed cuffs. Colour-locked so it survives the office and the wash.

products.title: Lune Peace Silk Blouse
products.raw_description: Occasionwear with a clear conscience. 100% Ahimsa (peace) silk — cocoons harvested only after the moth emerges naturally. Handloomed, 90gsm, GOTS-certified processing with azo-free dyes. Each blouse takes an artisan two days.

products.title: Ondine Slip Dress
products.raw_description: Liquid black, floor-grazing. 100% cupro satin regenerated from cotton linter waste in a closed-loop Japanese mill. Vegan silk alternative with real weight and drape. French seams throughout; made in a 12-person atelier.

products.title: Brume Organza Skirt
products.raw_description: Clouds you can wear. Layered skirt: outer 100% peace silk organza, lining 100% TENCEL Lyocell so it sits softly on skin. GOTS-certified dye house. A-line, hidden side zip, midi length.

products.title: Voyage Jumpsuit
products.raw_description: One piece, endless occasions. 100% TENCEL Lyocell twill with a peached finish, 180gsm. Wide leg, wrap bodice, self-belt. Full cost transparency: fabric ₹1,840 / labour ₹2,100 / everything else on our site.

products.title: Summit Grid Fleece
products.raw_description: Alpine warmth without the guilt trip. 94% recycled polyester grid fleece (GRS, from post-consumer bottles) / 6% elastane. Bluesign approved fabric, PFC-free. Zoned breathability panels, harness-compatible pockets.

products.title: Cirrus 3L Shell
products.raw_description: Fully waterproof, fully PFC-free. 3-layer shell: face 100% recycled nylon (GRS), waterproof-breathable membrane free of fluorocarbons, 20K/20K rating. Bluesign system product. Pit zips, helmet-compatible hood. Repair patches included.

products.title: Traverse Hike Pants
products.raw_description: Scramble-ready stretch. 88% recycled polyamide / 12% elastane double-weave, Bluesign approved, PFC-free DWR. Articulated knees, zip pockets, ankle cinches. 1% of the price goes to trail restoration.

products.title: Alpenglow Base Layer
products.raw_description: Next-to-skin warmth for cold starts. 60% RWS merino wool / 40% TENCEL Lyocell jersey, 190gsm — merino for warmth and odour control, TENCEL for wicking and durability. Flatlock seams. Machine wash wool cycle.

products.title: Basecamp Insulated Parka
products.raw_description: Warmest thing we make. Shell: 100% recycled polyester (GRS). Insulation: 100% recycled-content synthetic down alternative — no animal down, no cold spots when wet. PFC-free DWR, Bluesign approved. Thigh-length, storm cuffs, faux-fur-free hood.

products.title: Fieldnote Hemp Tee
products.raw_description: Hemp does more with less: rain-fed, pesticide-free, and it returns nutrients to the soil. 55% hemp / 45% USDA-certified organic cotton jersey, 190gsm. Undyed — zero dye chemistry, zero dye water. Softens dramatically with wear.

products.title: Indigo Hemp Workshirt
products.raw_description: Dipped 12 times in a natural indigo vat — no synthetic dyes, no heavy metals. 100% hemp chambray, 170gsm. The indigo will fade and patina like good denim. Corozo buttons, boxy fit, zero-waste pattern (every scrap of the lay plan is used).

products.title: Trailhead Hemp Shorts
products.raw_description: Tough shorts, gentle footprint. 70% hemp / 30% organic cotton canvas, 260gsm. Hemp's tensile strength means these outlast cotton shorts 2-to-1. Deep pockets, gusseted crotch, natural corozo button.

products.title: Homestead Hemp Jacket
products.raw_description: A chore jacket for the next thirty years. 100% hemp canvas, 320gsm, dyed with walnut hulls from a food-industry byproduct stream. Zero-waste cutting, hand-finished seams. USDA organic certified fibre. Ages beautifully.

products.title: Meadow Hemp Dress
products.raw_description: Easy A-line in breathable hemp-blend. 60% hemp / 40% organic cotton poplin, 150gsm, dyed with sage and iron (natural dye, low water). Pockets, square neckline, grown-on sleeves. USDA organic cotton, rain-fed hemp.

products.title: Court Shorts
products.raw_description: 7-inch training shorts. 90% recycled polyester (GRS) / 10% elastane woven stretch, 130gsm. Laser-cut ventilation, zip back pocket, recycled drawcord. OEKO-TEX Standard 100.

products.title: Ember Rib Turtleneck
products.raw_description: Slim rib turtleneck with serious softness. 85% TENCEL Modal / 15% recycled polyamide, tight 14-gauge knit that holds its shape. B Corp made, low-impact dyed. Layers under everything.

products.title: Heirloom Baby Blanket
products.raw_description: Softest start. 100% GOTS organic cotton muslin, double-layered, 120x120cm. No optical brighteners, no formaldehyde finishes, nothing but cotton — certified safe for newborn skin. Gets softer with every wash for years.

products.title: Boot Socks 3-Pack
products.raw_description: Warm feet, wild sourcing. 65% RWS merino wool / 30% recycled polyamide (for durability at heel and toe) / 5% elastane. Cushioned sole, seamless toe. OEKO-TEX yarns, knitted in Denmark.

products.title: Tide Bucket Hat
products.raw_description: Sun cover, coastal style. Outer 100% European Flax linen; lining 100% organic cotton. Packable, machine washable, UPF 30. Plastic-free trims.
